name: make
description: Run targets defined in a Makefile

name: -C
--directory
options.description: Change to this directory before reading the Makefile

name: -f
--file
--makefile
options.description: Read this file as the Makefile

name: -k
--keep-going
options.description: Keep going after a target fails

name: -n
--dry-run
--just-print
options.description: Print the recipes without running them

name: -s
--silent
--quiet
options.description: Do not echo recipes as they run
